name: Breaded Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 large head broccoli cut into spears
2 eggs beaten and seasoned with salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli in lightly salted water until al dente. Drain well.
2. Dip each piece of broccoli into the egg mixture, coating it evenly.
3. Place the coated broccoli pieces into the seasoned breadcrumbs, pressing to ensure a good coverage.
4. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy skillet to 350°F (175°C).
5. Carefully add the breaded broccoli pieces to the hot oil and fry until golden brown, turning occasionally for even cooking.
6. Remove the fried pieces with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. This can be made ahead of time and kept warm, uncovered, in the oven.
